text:
Hi,
 I saw a bug opened by on Free BSD site for a perl process stuck in pipewr state.
 I also face the same problem. I am using freeBSD 4.11 release 
 
  What solution did you propose to resolve this issue ?
 
 
 Anurag Tangri
